full_text:
Liu Fu (Yuanying) 劉馥 (元穎)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Liu Fu (劉馥), styledYuanying (元穎), was born in Pei. His farming and defence improvements in Yangzhou allowed Wei to keep control of the area. Liu Fu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Liu Fu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
